movies.title: Coco
movies.description: Aspiring musician Miguel, confronted with his family's ancestral ban on music, enters the Land of the Dead to find his great-great-grandfather, a legendary singer.

movies.title: Cruella
movies.description: During the 1970s London punk rock revolution, young grifter Estella transforms herself into the raucous, revenge-bent Cruella de Vil.

movies.title: Free Guy
movies.description: When Guy, a bank teller, learns that he is a non-player character in a bloodthirsty, open-world video game, he goes on to become the hero of the story and takes the responsibility of saving the world.

movies.title: How To Train Your Dragon
movies.description: As an ancient threat endangers both Vikings and dragons alike on the isle of Berk, the friendship between Hiccup, an inventive Viking, and Toothless, a Night Fury dragon, becomes the key to both species forging a new future together.

movies.title: Jai Bhim
movies.description: When a tribal man is arrested for a case of alleged theft, his wife turns to a human-rights lawyer to help bring justice.

movies.title: Spider Man: No Way Home
movies.description: With Spider-Man's identity now revealed, Peter asks Doctor Strange for help. When a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start to appear.

tvshows.title: And Just Like That
tvshows.description: And Just Like That... is the Sex and the City revival, following Carrie, Miranda, and Charlotte navigating love, friendship, and life in their 50s in NYC. Modern, mature, but still stylish.

tvshows.title: Foundation
tvshows.description: Foundation is a sci-fi epic based on Isaac Asimov's novels, following mathematician Hari Seldon as his predictions of the Galactic Empire's fall spark rebellion. Spanning centuries, it explores destiny, power, and survival across the stars. Stunning visuals, complex politics.

tvshows.title: Loki
tvshows.description: Loki is a Marvel series following the God of Mischief after he escapes with the Tesseract (Avengers: Endgame). Arrested by the Time Variance Authority (TVA), he’s forced to fix timeline chaos—or face erasure. Dark humor, time-bending twists, and Tom Hiddleston’s iconic charm.

tvshows.title: Mouse
tvshows.description: Mouse is a gripping South Korean psychological thriller (2021) about a detective hunting a serial killer with psychopathic genes. The story explores nature vs. nurture, with shocking twists, brutal crimes, and a morally gray protagonist. Stars Lee Seung-gi and Lee Hee-joon.

tvshows.title: Squid Game
tvshows.description: Squid Game is a brutal South Korean survival drama where 456 desperate players compete in deadly children's games for a 45.6 billion won prize (≈$38M). The catch? Losing means death.

tvshows.title: The Boys
tvshows.description: The Boys is a brutal, darkly comic superhero satire where corrupt, celebrity-like supes abuse their powers, and a ragtag team (The Boys) fights back—with no rules.
